title: Phyllorkis nematopoda
taxonomy: Phyllorkis nematopoda is classified in the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, it is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Phyllorkis is a part of the tribe Coelogyninae. Orchidaceae is an order within the monocot clade, Asparagales. At the kingdom level, Phyllorkis nematopoda is classified as Plantae.

intro: Phyllorkis nematopoda is a plant species commonly known as the "Nematopoda orchid" or "Pilose orchid", belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its purported health benefits.
